# HPD.ML.TimeSeries.SpectralResidualDetector

- Package: `HPD-ML-TimeSeries` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Kind: `class`

IScanTransform for spectral residual anomaly detection. No training needed — computes FFT spectral residual on each window. Window size must be a power of 2.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class SpectralResidualDetector : HPD.ML.Abstractions.IScanTransform<HPD.ML.TimeSeries.SpectralResidualState>, HPD.ML.Abstractions.ITransform
```

